_comment: Local URI->schema/SHACL map for ConformanceValidate.py --source local. Keys are dcterms:conformsTo profile URIs (trailing-slash and datadescription/data_description insensitive). Paths are relative to this file. Both 1.0 and 1.1 versions map to this repo's current framed-tree schemas. Other conformance URIs resolve as no_schema in local mode (use --source w3id for the authoritative set). data_description has no dedicated SHACL shapes file, so its shacl entry is omitted.
